title: Filtering for Cell Collection
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"79uij","text":"Filtering protocol adapted from SangHoon Lee","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1bd16","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8lh16","text":"Materials needed for cruise:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":28}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fh9kh","text":"4 acid washed 20L cubitainers ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fr99g","text":"8 60cm pieces of acid washed tubing ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"57f41","text":"Gloves ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"460v3","text":"Sharpie ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3gfqo","text":"2 coolers large enough to hold all 4 cubitainers","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3tan4","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4qd12","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":[]},{"key":"1u6v6","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2mugl","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1tdb4","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"imageblock","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"E260C680585749B1AB730710F3D52FFB","height":null,"is_video":false,"mime":null,"original_name":null,"placeholder":"https://content.protocols.io/uxc2xe.png","source":"https://content.protocols.io/uxc2xe.png","width":null}}}}
steps: Pump → Steel filter tank → A/E filter → Durapore → DI rinsed cubie container (the one the sample was in)
Clamp all tubes to manifolds and filter tanks
Make sure bleeder valves are on top
Turn on pump and then bleed A/E then Durapore and the A/E again Turn manifold on side, bleeder valves should be on highest side of manifold.
Keep cubie container on ice- water will be used for viral concentration When finished filtering: KEEP PUMP ON UNTIL ALL FILTERS HAVE BEEN REMOVED
Place “out” tube from Durapore onto a filter flask that is attached to the vacuum side of the pump Make sure white trap is on tube so no seawater can get into the pump.
Wait until water stops moving towards the vacuum and only bubbles are coming through If opened too fast bubbles go backwards.
Open steel filter tank lid and slowly open tank bleeder valve to depressurize (SLOWLY)
When pressure has dropped significantly push in steel tank lid, allow a few more minutes for water to drain through
Disconnect clamp from bottom side of A/E filter, remove tube from “out” side of A/E
Place Durapore on knees and swirl gently so all water goes into the filter flask
Once water is out, open manifold slowly, fold up filter and place in whirlpack Should see nothing on it.
Remove Durapore “out” tube from filter flask, place A/E “out” tube onto filter flask Need to reattach “in” Durapore to “out” A/E.
Place A/E on knees, let water drain out into the filter flask as before
Open manifold slowly, peel off ring of filter, discard, fold filter and place in whirlpack Will be tinted in color.

Okay to turn off pump now If pump is turned off before filtering is over you need to close steel tank lines so the whole system stays pressurized. Use the black levers or knobs on the steel tanks to do this.
creator: Jed Fuhrman
